_comment: Named locations on the CNA map. Hex IDs use CCRR format (column-row). Key strategic locations from Morocco to Egypt.

locations.name: Oran
locations.significance: Major Allied port after Operation Torch

locations.name: Algiers
locations.significance: Capital of French Algeria; key Allied base after Torch

locations.name: Bone (Annaba)
locations.significance: Easternmost major Algerian port

locations.name: Tripoli
locations.significance: Main Axis supply port and capital of Italian Libya

locations.name: Tunis
locations.significance: Capital of Tunisia; final Axis redoubt

locations.name: Bizerte
locations.significance: Major naval base; key to Tunisia defense

locations.name: Gabes
locations.significance: Mareth Line southern anchor

locations.name: Mareth
locations.significance: Site of the Mareth Line fortifications

locations.name: Benghazi
locations.significance: Key Axis supply port; changed hands 4 times

locations.name: Brega (El Agheila)
locations.significance: Natural bottleneck; frequently the front line

locations.name: Agedabia
locations.significance: Road junction south of Benghazi

locations.name: Mechili
locations.significance: Key desert crossroads fort

locations.name: Bir Hacheim
locations.significance: Free French held this in 1942 Gazala battle

locations.name: Derna
locations.significance: Important coastal town; changes hands repeatedly

locations.name: Gazala
locations.significance: Site of major 1942 British defensive line

locations.name: Knightsbridge
locations.significance: Crucial supply box in Gazala battle

locations.name: Sidi Rezegh
locations.significance: Critical airfield area; Operation Crusader fighting

locations.name: Bardia
locations.significance: Italian fortress town on the frontier

locations.name: Capuzzo
locations.significance: Fort Capuzzo; frontier fighting

locations.name: Halfaya Pass
locations.significance: 'Hellfire Pass'; key escarpment crossing

locations.name: Sollum
locations.significance: Egyptian frontier town; escarpment port

locations.name: Buq Buq
locations.significance: Water wells; key for Italian logistics

locations.name: Sidi Barrani
locations.significance: Italian 10th Army HQ during 1940 invasion

locations.name: Tobruk
locations.significance: The most contested position in the whole campaign; besieged 1941

locations.name: Mersa Matruh
locations.significance: British defensive position; railhead

locations.name: Galal
locations.significance: Water wells along the coast

locations.name: El Alamein
locations.significance: THE decisive battle of the Western Desert; two major battles here

locations.name: Ruweisat Ridge
locations.significance: Key defensive feature at El Alamein

locations.name: Alam Halfa Ridge
locations.significance: Rommel's last offensive was turned back here

locations.name: Qattara Depression edge
locations.significance: Southern flank anchor; impassable salt flat

locations.name: Qattara Depression
locations.significance: Impassable; fixes the southern flank of all El Alamein positions

locations.name: Alexandria
locations.significance: Main British naval base; never falls

locations.name: Cairo
locations.significance: British GHQ Middle East; infinite supply base

locations.name: Suez
locations.significance: The strategic prize — control of the Suez Canal

locations.name: Siwa Oasis
locations.significance: LRDG base; deep desert route
